title: Binary Search: The Secret to Finding Quickly

dialogue.line: Stewie, what's this binary search I keep hearing about?
Imagine looking for a villain in an alphabetized phone book.
I just flip to the middle and start there!
Exactly! Binary search divides and conquers.
It checks the middle, then decides up or down.
This efficiently narrows your search, halving options each time.
Oh, like when I dig through Lois's cookie stash!
Precisely! Why waste time opening every tin?
Binary search speeds up finding items in sorted data.
So, more cookies, less time... I like it!
Now if only Lois hid those cookies alphabetically...
